title: Integrated Planning & S&OP Bridge
guardrails: Planning packets and Twin scenario drafts are advisory — changing SO lines, POs, inventory reservations, WMS tasks, shipments, or executing Twin scenarios stays outside this sprint workflow.
Queue review writes audit events and AssistantActionQueueItem rows — it does not apply plans or mutate operational records automatically.

steps: Sign in with orders or CRM demand view, suppliers or products supply view, and WMS or Control Tower execution view.
Open /assistant/planning-bridge (also linked as Sprint 22 in the assistant subnav).
Click Create Sprint 22 packet and confirm AssistantPlanningPacket plus Twin scenario draft persistence.
scenarios.passWhen: POST create_packet returns 201; GET snapshot lists the packet; SO/PO/inventory/WMS/Twin operational rows unchanged.

steps: Optionally add an approval note on a packet.
scenarios.passWhen: Packet status REVIEW_QUEUED; audit answerKind planning_bridge_review; action queue references assistant_planning_packet.

steps: Ensure demo tenant has open WMS tasks or capacity plans or MD quality runs in horizon.
Reload preview or create a packet.
scenarios.passWhen: constraintJson lists sources with severity; recommendations remain human-approved.
